title: Durgapur Cold Snap
lead: Durgapur is experiencing a cold snap with a Z-Score of -1.50. This unusual event has a score of 5.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Durgapur are characterized by a significant drop in temperature, resulting in a Heating Degree Day (HDD) value of 3.0 GG.
 The humidity level is at 60%, with no wind, as indicated by a wind speed of 0.0 km/h.
 The absence of Cooling Degree Days (CDD) with a value of 0.0 GG further emphasizes the cold conditions.
conclusion: Monitor the situation for further updates.
